page_metadata.biotools__summary: RDKit-based overlap measure that combines volumetric shape and pharmacophoric features to give a combined overlap score similar to OpenEye's Tversky Combo and Malhotra and Karanicolas' COS measure.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: RDKit-based overlap measure that combines volumetric shape and pharmacophoric features to give a combined overlap score similar to OpenEye's Tversky Combo and Malhotra and Karanicolas' COS measure.
